response.justification: Bogdan possesses a robust background as a Staff Software Engineer with extensive experience in full-stack development, cloud technologies, and technical leadership, including direct involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP). While his expertise in agentic workflows and mentoring aligns well with some aspects of the role, there are notable gaps in his resume regarding specific GenAI components like RAG architectures and vector databases, as well as explicit experience with Python and a sustained history of developing AI-driven solutions for the required 8+ years.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP.
Proven staff-level technical leadership and mentoring capabilities.
Strong full-stack and cloud development background (TypeScript, AWS, Kubernetes).
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and vector databases.
Lack of demonstrated proficiency in Python, a key language for GenAI.
Unclear if 8+ years of experience includes substantial work specifically on AI-driven solutions.
